title: coap_dtn.c: audit and update deaddrop_oscore_respond helper
description: Review deaddrop_oscore_respond for correct use of coap_oscore_protect_response with piv (including len=0), buffer size (128 bytes), error path returning proper code, and alignment with worker8 changes and main unprotect. Fix any buffer issues or return value inconsistencies.
close_reason: Updated deaddrop_oscore_respond to support piv_len=0, increased buffer to 256 bytes, fixed error path to use lichen_coap_respond for consistency with main paths and worker8 changes. All 5 protected response paths now correctly use OSCORE helper. Verified via code audit and partial build.
